title: Bridge Essay: Brain activation associated with pride and shame.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Wind/Pride** (Phase 4) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Wind/Pride to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Brain activation associated with pride and shame.** — Neuropsychobiology. PMID: 24577108. DOI: 10.1159/000358090. Self-referential emotions such as shame/guilt and pride provide evaluative information about persons themselves. In addition to emotional aspects, social and self-referential processes play arole in self-referential emotions. Prior studies have rather focused on comparing self-referential and other-referential processes of one valence, triggered mostly by external stimuli.
